name: virtual-room-platform
description: A production-ready Virtual Room Platform with E2EE and WebRTC.

scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:room" "npm run dev:chat" "npm run dev:realtime" "npm run dev:ai" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build:all: cd backend/api-gateway && npm run build && cd ../auth-service && npm run build && cd ../room-service && npm run build && cd ../chat-service && npm run build && cd ../realtime-service && npm run build && cd ../ai-service && npm run build && cd ../../frontend && npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend/api-gateway && npm install && cd ../auth-service && npm install && cd ../room-service && npm install && cd ../chat-service && npm install && cd ../realtime-service && npm install && cd ../ai-service && npm install && cd ../../frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps
